name: 2020 Iranian Parliamentary Election (11th Majlis)
description: The February 2020 parliamentary election produced another conservative sweep, with the [Guardian Council](/orgs/guardian-council) disqualifying over 9,000 candidates including many moderate incumbents. Turnout was a record low of approximately 42% nationally and around 25% in Tehran. The principlist coalition won a large majority, and [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps)-aligned figure [Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf](/people/mohammad-bagher-ghalibaf) was elected Speaker days later. The election represented the full consolidation of hardliner control over the legislature.
editorial_notes: Record low turnout. Over 9,000 candidates disqualified by Guardian Council. Ghalibaf elected Speaker 28 May 2020.
